---
title: "analyze_failures.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/analyze_failures.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 7
logic_score: 3.10
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 5.12
overall_score: 4.58
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating analyze_benchmarks, main. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `analyze_benchmarks`
- `main`
